# Formal Proofs

## Generated by c4reqber

This directory contains machine-checkable formal proofs produced by the c4reqber meta-solver. Each proof is verified by at least one backend (Lean4, Coq, Dafny, Agda, or Hoare logic).

## Directory Structure

```
formal-proofs/
├── README.md           # This file
├── lean4/              # Lean 4 proofs
├── coq/                # Coq proofs
├── dafny/              # Dafny proofs
├── agda/               # Agda proofs
└── hoare/              # Hoare logic derivations
```

## Adaptive Topology Foundational Theorems

The following theorems form the foundation of the adaptive topology framework:

| Theorem | Backend | Status |
|---------|---------|--------|
| Fixed Point Existence | Lean4 | Verified |
| Continuity Preservation | Coq | Verified |
| Convergence Bound | Dafny | Verified |

## Adding New Discoveries

When c4reqber discovers and verifies a new theorem:

1. The proof is written to the appropriate backend directory
2. A metadata file records the verification status
3. This index is updated with the theorem entry

To manually add a proof:

```bash
c4reqber prove --theorem "your_theorem_name" --backend lean4 --output formal-proofs/lean4/
```

## Verification

All proofs in this corpus can be re-verified:

```bash
c4reqber verify --corpus formal-proofs/
```
